_meta.generator_note: This is a semantic compiled module spec, not a CSV-row wrapper.

validations.logic: No role/action is allowed unless an active permission rule explicitly allows it.
MVP uses fixed role catalog. Custom roles require future change request.
Public role cannot read internal/staff/business/audit collections.
Any school-facing role must be scoped to own school only.
Business and audit records must not have hard delete permission.
Staff cannot grant, modify or approve own role/scope/permissions.
Permission changes require Security/Admin Reviewer or Super Admin approval.
High-risk actions must use maker-checker policy where configured.
Same user cannot make and approve same high-risk action.
Non-admin operational roles require assignment scope.
Operations roles cannot access answer keys unless explicitly content/evaluation role.
Finance roles see payment summaries/counts, not student PII by default.
Support role sees only issue-relevant masked data.
At least one active Super Admin must remain.
Access review flags sensitive permission drift.
